Notes

My Other Interests

看起来，你想要更加了解我……

Other Interests

This section contains various other things I’m interested in beyond games, movies, and books.

Music

Some of my favorite albums and artists that have shaped my musical taste.

Travel

Places I’ve visited and dream destinations I hope to explore.

Tech

Latest gadgets, software, and technological innovations I find fascinating.

Music

I enjoy exploring different music genres, from classical to electronic. Some of my favorite artists include:

  • Artist Example
  • Another Artist

Travel

Traveling allows me to experience different cultures and broaden my perspectives. Here are some places I’d love to visit:

  • Japan for its rich culture and technology
  • Iceland for its stunning landscapes
  • Italy for art and cuisine

Photography

Capturing moments and telling stories through photos is a passion of mine. I primarily shoot landscapes and street photography.
